methods.boolean equals(int x, int y): Returns true if the point's coordinates equal (x, y)
methods.boolean equals(Object o): Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
methods.int hashCode(): Returns a hash code value for the object.
methods.void offset(int dx, int dy): Offset the point's coordinates by dx, dy
methods.void readFromParcel(Parcel in): Set the point's coordinates from the data stored in the specified parcel.
methods.void set(int x, int y): Set the point's x and y coordinates
methods.String toString(): Returns a string representation of the object.
methods.void writeToParcel(Parcel out, int flags: Write this point to the specified parcel.
